roster_delta.desc: Philadelphia Phillies activated RHP Brad Keller from the 15-day injured list.
Philadelphia Phillies placed RHP Lou Trivino III on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 7, 2026. Right thoracic muscle spasm.
Philadelphia Phillies optioned RHP Seth Johnson to Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Philadelphia Phillies recalled RHP Alan Rangel from Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Milwaukee Brewers optioned LHP Robert Gasser to ACL Brewers.
Pittsburgh Pirates placed C Endy Rodríguez on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 6, 2026. Left glute strain.
Pittsburgh Pirates signed free agent 3B Grae Kessinger to a minor league contract.
Pittsburgh Pirates recalled C Rafael Flores Jr. from Indianapolis Indians.
Baltimore Orioles sent C Chadwick Tromp outright to Norfolk Tides.
Cincinnati Reds signed free agent LHP Manuel Sanchez to a minor league contract.
Cincinnati Reds sent RF Will Benson outright to Louisville Bats.

Cleveland Guardians recalled RHP Codi Heuer from Columbus Clippers.

Miami Marlins signed free agent RHP Lizdawin Paulino to a minor league contract.

Boston Red Sox recalled 3B Brett Harris from Worcester Red Sox.
New York Mets placed RHP Austin Warren on the 15-day injured list. Right forearm strain.
New York Mets designated RHP Matt Seelinger for assignment.
New York Mets selected the contract of RHP Xzavion Curry from Syracuse Mets.
New York Mets recalled RHP Tobias Myers from Syracuse Mets.
New York Mets designated CF Jared Oliva for assignment.
New York Mets selected the contract of RHP Dan Hammer from Syracuse Mets.
New York Mets optioned RHP Tobias Myers to Syracuse Mets.
Athletics activated LF Tyler Soderstrom from the 10-day injured list.

Chicago White Sox recalled RHP Tyler Davis from Charlotte Knights.
Los Angeles Angels signed free agent OF Pablo Reyes to a minor league contract.
Los Angeles Angels activated CF Mike Trout from the 10-day injured list.
Los Angeles Angels designated 3B Donovan Walton for assignment.
Minnesota Twins signed free agent RHP Wisarly Reinoso to a minor league contract.
Minnesota Twins signed free agent RHP Matt Bowman to a minor league contract.
Minnesota Twins placed RHP Marco Raya on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 5, 2026. Right shoulder impingement.

Minnesota Twins activated RHP Bailey Ober from the 15-day injured list.
Minnesota Twins recalled LHP Kendry Rojas from St. Paul Saints.

Atlanta Braves optioned LHP Connor Thomas to Gwinnett Stripers.

Atlanta Braves activated RF Eli White from the paternity list.
St. Louis Cardinals designated LHP Jared Shuster for assignment.

St. Louis Cardinals optioned RHP Hunter Dobbins to Memphis Redbirds.
Toronto Blue Jays signed free agent RF Daz Cameron to a minor league contract.
San Diego Padres placed LF Samad Taylor on the 10-day injured list. Right oblique strain.
San Diego Padres selected the contract of 3B Luis Rengifo from El Paso Chihuahuas.
Los Angeles Dodgers signed free agent RHP Jose Acevedo to a minor league contract.
San Francisco Giants placed CF Jonah Cox on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 6, 2026. Left oblique strain.
San Francisco Giants recalled C Jesus Rodriguez from Sacramento River Cats.
